name: ep-qa-pipeline
description: ExpoPlatform QA pipeline - turns a Jira ticket into groomed requirements, a channel-tagged checklist, and test cases, then reviews the sub-task PRs, runs REST API testing ([API] cases), and runs browser UI testing ([UI] cases). Includes two one-command orchestrators (qa-pipeline-docs, qa-pipeline-code), a run-health analyzer, and Jira QA-sub-task publishing.
